description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live Game or Archive Game
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user had Fast Rewound

steps.action: WHEN the user presses select to play after Rewind
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear “<Which half of inning + Inning>, <Away Team + Away Team Score>, <Home Team + Home Team Score>, Press select to Pause”
For example: "Bottom of the 3rd, Cubs 4, Cardinals 2, Press select to Pause"
